words.definition: The act of formally presenting yourself or another person to someone
words.example: She made a confident introduction at the start of the meeting.

words.definition: Relaxed and informal in style or manner
words.example: We had a casual conversation over coffee in the break room.

words.definition: Following established rules of behaviour and etiquette
words.example: The job interview required formal attire and professional language.

words.definition: An act of saying goodbye, often in a meaningful or ceremonial way
words.example: We organised a farewell party for our colleague before she moved abroad.

words.definition: A polite expression of admiration or praise directed at someone
words.example: She gave me a lovely compliment on my presentation skills.

words.definition: Giving a feeling of enjoyment, comfort, or satisfaction
words.example: We had a very pleasant conversation at the welcome reception.

words.definition: Lasting only a short time; using few words
words.example: We had a brief chat in the corridor before the class started.

words.definition: A person you know slightly but not well enough to call a close friend
words.example: She is just an acquaintance; we met once at a conference.

words.definition: In a way that is honest, genuine, and free from pretence
words.example: He thanked her sincerely for all the support she had given him.

words.definition: To show that you have noticed or recognised someone
words.example: Always acknowledge people when they greet you, even if you are busy.

words.definition: Friendly, open, and easy to talk to
words.example: The new manager is very approachable and always has time to listen.

words.definition: The accepted rules of polite behaviour in a society or profession
words.example: Knowing proper business etiquette is essential at international events.

words.definition: Warm, friendly, and pleasantly polite in manner
words.example: The host greeted every guest with a cordial smile and a firm handshake.

words.definition: A polite or friendly remark exchanged in a social conversation
words.example: We exchanged a few pleasantries before getting down to business.

words.definition: To respond to an action by doing the same thing in return
words.example: If someone greets you warmly, it is polite to reciprocate.
